text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm comin' in, Teach. Have you had lunch yet?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've made us boxed lunches. Wanna eat them
together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, I join Hishi Amazon for lunch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Havin' lunch under a blue sky sure is great.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, the burdock root is nice and salty, and it
was a good choice to make the rolled omelet
sweeter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The lunch she's packed is a true hallmark of her
attention to detail. It's nutritionally balanced and
brimming with care.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Feeling some tea, Teach? I've got some piping
hot and ready to go here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take in the calm, relaxing atmosphere... but I
can't maintain my zen because of a small,
persistent question in the back of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon's not the type to idle the time away
for the fun of it, so maybe there's something she
wants to discuss with me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? No, not at all. Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks at me in confusion. I try to explain my
train of thought, but when I do...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! What are you goin' on about?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There isn't anything special behind this.
Sometimes I just want to take things slow.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I first started running with
you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And there's still much more running to do. More
crying, more laughing, more winning, and more
losing too...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Things are definitely going to be chaotic. But
that's just how we roll.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I thought it'd be nice to take time out
to do nothin' but chill now and again.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This is just a little break. Nothing more. Anyway,
here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She hands me some hot tea.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll be counting on you for the long run, Teach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a sip of tea, and the gentle flavor warms
me to the core.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins the next leg of my journey with
Hishi Amazon.
